name: test-writing
description: Generate and validate PHPUnit unit tests for Shopware 6. Analyzes source classes to detect category (DTO, Service, Flow/Event, DAL, Exception) and applies category-specific templates. Split reviewer architecture: read-only reviewer for analysis, fixer agent for fix iterations (reduces context bloat). Oscillation detection, error/warning codes for Shopware compliance. Bundles MCP server config (requires dev-tooling plugin installed). Configure via .mcp-php-tooling.json.
